content: If we integrate an Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) to guide spreading activation in RAG-based large language model associative recall, the ICM can intrinsically reward activation that spreads to under-connected, underexplored nodes in the knowledge graph, pulling novel, unexpected associations out of long-tail knowledge that standard greedy spreading activation would miss. This creates a self-improving retrieval loop where the agent’s curiosity continuously expands the scope of useful associative recall beyond frequently activated high-frequency documents.
source_topics: **Spreading Activation for large language model associative recall
trigger_topic: **Spreading Activation for large language model associative recall
